meaning: n.[宗](伊斯兰教的)苏非派禁欲神秘主义
examples: He translated T.S. Eliot and Ezra Pound, besides writing Sufism-flavoured verses of his own.
He translated T. S. Eliot and Ezra Pound, besides writing Sufism-flavoured verses of his own.
He was uniquely equipped not only to recover Iranian Sufism for the West, but also to defend the principal Western traditions of esoteric spirituality.
Sufism is a mystical dimension of Islam considered offbeat and frowned upon by Islamic hardliners.
Sufism is a mystical dimension of Islam considered offbeat by Islamic hardliners, who frown upon it.
